basics.name: Gabriel Griffin
basics.summary: Industrial and Systems Engineering student at the University of Oklahoma pursuing research in optimization, decision-making, and networked systems.

work.company: University of Oklahoma; NetSys Research Lab
work.summary: Conducted analysis of airline network resiliency using DMD.

work.company: Clemson Industrial Engineering; Tucker Research Group
work.summary: Conducted research into regret of facility decision making applied to parks in Greenville County, South Carolina.
highlights: Modeled decision-making context between park planners and recommendations.
Learned and applied mixed-integer and bi-level optimization methods in Gurobipy.
Worked closely with others over an extended period in a research project.

education.area: B.S. in Industrial and Systems Engineering (Honors)

publications.name: Optimizing Park Locations with Imperfect Information

presentations.name: Mapping Need: Geospatial Analysis for Optimizing Park Access
Methods for Modeling Regret of Parameterization Choices
